3098780.name: Chuck Bonesteel & The Alien Apocalypse
3098780.description:
CHUCK BONESTEEL: Earth's Last Hope

With Earth's armies shattered and humanity enslaved, one man refuses to kneel: CHUCK BONESTEEL.

Step into the boots of 1986's ultimate action hero and take back Earth in this retro roguelike shooter.

Murder horde after horde of gib-filled aliens in intense, old-school combat. Grind your way through 20 waves while collecting meaty upgrades along the way. 

Grab loot to upgrade permanent stats and fulfill your destiny as Earth's ultimate savior.

Features

  • Brutal, juicy combat

  • Short, fast-paced runs

  • Guns

  • Chunky upgrades between waves ensure each run is unique and unpredictable

  • Blast aliens to collect loot and buy permanent stat boosts

  • Straightforward upgrade system = less thinking and more shooting

  • Over 70 face-melting metal tracks to fuel your rampage

  • Upgradeable mullet
